text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, Bourbon! Thanks for celebrating my
birthday. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As a little something in return, I'm gonna do an
impromptu birthday concert right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Standing by for Operation: Call and
Response.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're joking... If we do a concert here, a fuming
Air Groove will come running at any second...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we call it off? We're fast, but some
things even we can't run from.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I guess... But an Umadol always responds in kind
to the love she receives.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Then how about we apply for permission to use
the outdoor stage?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In doing so, we should be able to enjoy your
birthday concert without any trouble.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! All right, if we apply right away, we
should get the OK by tomorrow, right? No time
to waste! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...But then it won't be a "birthday" concert
anymore.
